name: KidzDev Unity Addressables Toolkit
description: Utilities for working with Unity Addressables — asset loading, pooling, scope tracking, CDN switching, and content download.

name: KidzDev Unity Recyclable Scroll
description: High-performance recyclable ScrollRect for Unity uGUI — object pooling, linear & loop modes, variable item sizes, sync/async item loading.

name: KidzDev Unity Responsive Fit
description: Responsive item sizing for Unity uGUI — fit scroll/grid items to any screen (items-per-view, aspect ratio, fixed columns, safe area).

name: KidzDev Unity Localization
description: Lightweight localization system with UniTask async loading. JSON and ScriptableObject data sources, plug-in custom loaders, and auto-refreshing TMP_Text components.

name: KidzDev Unity Extensions
description: Handy C# / Unity extension methods — strings, collections, arrays, dictionaries, and more.

name: KidzDev Unity State Machine
description: Production-grade state machine — synchronous and UniTask-async flavors, optional transition graph with per-edge guards, QueueLatest button-mash safety, and no-state-collapse guarantees.

name: KidzDev Unity Google Sheet Importer
description: Editor tool for importing data from Google Sheets into Unity. Fetches rows via the Sheets API v4, maps columns to C# fields via reflection, and writes them as JSON or ScriptableObject assets.

name: KidzDev Unity Audio
description: Production-grade BGM/SFX/Ambience audio service. UniTask async, AudioMixer-backed with dB conversion, cancellable crossfades, pooled sources, plug-in clip loader, and plug-in volume store.

name: KidzDev Unity Scroll Snap
description: ScrollRect-based snap pager for Unity uGUI — horizontal and vertical axes, dot indicators, number indicators, and prev/next navigation.

name: KidzDev Unity Screen Navigator
description: Stack-based UI/scene navigation — push/pop history with a back button, async transitions, and an injectable animation seam. UniTask-only, zero singleton coupling.

name: KidzDev Unity Safe Area
description: Two complementary notch / safe-area components for Unity uGUI — shrink a RectTransform to the device safe area, or fill the region outside it with colour bars. In-editor device simulator support and per-axis control.

name: KidzDev Unity Popup
description: Modal dialogs you await for a typed result — ShowAsync<TResult>(), stacked popups, async transitions, and a per-popup loader split (Resources / Direct / Addressables). UniTask-only.
